title: Ketosis basics
script_summary: A brief, engaging explanation of ketosis and its scientific basis.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about ketosis basics.
Ketosis is a metabolic state where your body burns fat for fuel instead of carbs.
But how does this actually happen? When carb intake drops, your insulin levels lower.
The liver then converts fats into ketones, which serve as energy for your brain and body.
Research shows that ketosis can aid in weight loss and improve mental clarity.
Curious to learn more about ketosis? Hit that like button and follow for more science!
